title: MassTech The Mod
description: A Basic Mod to add armor and tools
body:
MTTM 1.19.2 Requires HybridLib-1.0.6-1.19.2

 

 This mod adds blocks and items Like Tier 1 thru 4 Tools Tech, Euclase, ICarus and ICarus(Tier 2) Tools Not Including Hoes. Also Adds Cheese, Burger and CheeseBurgers and More To come 
Not a Big Mod as of yet but it is growing

 

This is Just a Simple Reminder that This Mod is Only Uploaded to Curseforge and Modrinth Do not Download from any other places

 

You are welcome to use this mod in your mod pack as long as credit is provided.

Example of giving credit: MTTM by HybridAvenger69
